info.description: Sub-page under Shop > Emotional Support Jewellery (ESJ). All visible copy is editable here.

paragraph_1.default: Story-first pieces designed to hold you in hard moments. Each piece has a meaning and a purpose, chosen not just for beauty but for what it does.

paragraph_2.default: Moonstone for when you need to remember what is underneath the noise. Clear Quartz for the days your mind is doing too much. Rose Quartz for self-love. Amethyst for calm. Black Tourmaline for grounding and protection.

paragraph_3.default: The ESJ range began because clients kept asking: what can I wear that will remind me of the work we did together? Something I can touch when things get loud. Something that anchors me.

paragraph_4.default: Every crystal is hand-selected. Every piece is made in the UK. The story behind each stone is included with your order.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Use the 'Generate SEO' button if available, then edit.
